name: Vanguarr
overview: Surfaces per-user Suggested for You channels from Vanguarr inside Jellyfin.
description: Connects Jellyfin to Vanguarr's Suggested for You API, resolves ranked suggestions to existing library items, and exposes them as a per-user channel without extra libraries or symlink trees.

versions.changelog:
- Fixes playback errors on suggested TV shows by surfacing series and seasons as generic browseable containers instead of directly playable channel series items.
- Forces a channel cache refresh so Jellyfin rebuilds previously cached typed series entries.
- Keeps movie and episode suggestions on the normal playable media path.
